title: MCLN_FS_EX26B_Configuration Guide
fullText: MCLN_TUB_WMI_UNLOCATED EX 26B – Receiving Q & A Enhancements Configuration Guide Contents This document details the configuration steps for the EX 26B  – Receiving Q&A Enhancements . Note that some steps may already be configured in the environment due to the original EX26 configuration.   TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1 Foundational Configuration PAGEREF _Toc155094506 \h 3 1.1 Add EX26B System Code PAGEREF _Toc155094507 \h 3 1.2 Add E26 System Code PAGEREF _Toc155094508 \h 4 1.3 Enable Transaction Parameter PAGEREF _Toc155094509 \h 4 1.4 930 System Code Configuration PAGEREF _Toc155094510 \h 6 1.5 Questions UI PAGEREF _Toc155094511 \h 8 1.6 Question Answer Determination Rules UI PAGEREF _Toc155094512 \h 9 1.7 Item Miscellaneous Instructions Configuration PAGEREF _Toc155094513 \h 13 1.8 Item Set Up PAGEREF _Toc155094514 \h 14 1.9 ASN Custom Attributes (BOL, Seal, Trailer) PAGEREF _Toc155094515 \h 15 1.10 Message Configuration PAGEREF _Toc155094516 \h 17 Foundational Configuration Add EX 26 B System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for the EX 26 B Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click S ave Add E26 System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for the E26 Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save Enable Transaction Parameter Navigate to transactions UI. Search for Recv Shipment. Select transaction and click Program Template Click Add . Fill in parameter details and click Save. Navigate back to Recv Shipment transaction, enable parameter, and click Save. 930 System Code Configuration Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 930 Select the record and click Code ID s Select an existing Code Id record and click Copy Fill in the following details and click save Receive 1 Item b. Receive Multi Item c. Out of Range Questions UI Navigate to Questions UI Click Add Add the appropriate details for the Temperature questions Temp erature 1 through Temp erature 6 and Click Save Question Answer Determination Rules UI Navigate to Question Answer Determination Rules UI Click Add Criteria Select Receive 1 Item Business Activity Click Saved Filters and click Apply Fill out the following information and click Save and Apply Repeat steps 2-5 to add criteria for Multi Item and Out of Range . Select Receive 1 Item Filter Name and click Add Questions Add the 3 temperature questions previously added in the Questions UI for Single Item Click save Repeat with Receive Multi Item a nd Out of Range to add questions for Temp 1 and Temp 1 through Temp 6. Item Miscellaneous Instructions Configuration Item minimum and maximum temperatures are stored in the item’s Miscellaneous Instructions, which must be configured. Navigate to System Codes UI and open the Code IDs for B-140. Select “Add” and fill in as below to create minimum temperature. Select “Add” and fill in as below to create maximum temperature. Item Set Up Items requiring Question and Answer temperatures should have the Commerce Numeric Attribute 1 set to 1. ITEM_CBO.COMMERCE_NUM_ATTRIBUTE1 Item Minimum and Maximum temperature ranges are added in the Item Miscellaneous Instructions. ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 1/2 ASN Custom Attributes (BOL, Seal, Trailer) Navigate to Custom Attributes UI , click Add. 2. Fill in the following details to add BOL, Seal, and Trailer attributes to the ASNs . Message Configuration Navigate to Messages UI and ensure a message ID exists with the following configuration. Navigate to Message Master UI and ensure that a message ID 2604 exists with the following configuration.

chunks.text:
[Document: MCLN_FS_EX26B_Configuration Guide]

MCLN_TUB_WMI_UNLOCATED EX 26B – Receiving Q & A Enhancements Configuration Guide Contents This document details the configuration steps for the EX 26B  – Receiving Q&A Enhancements . Note that some steps may already be configured in the environment due to the original EX26 configuration.    1 Foundational Configuration  1.1 Add EX26B System Code  1.2 Add E26 System Code  1.3 Enable Transaction Parameter  1.4 930 System Code Configuration  1.5 Questions UI  1.6 Question Answer Determination Rules UI  1.7 Item Miscellaneous Instructions Configuration  1.8 Item Set Up  1.9 ASN Custom Attributes (BOL, Seal, Trailer)  1.10 Message Configuration  Foundational Configuration Add EX 26 B System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for the EX 26 B Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click S ave Add E26 System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for the E26 Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save Enable Transaction Parameter Navigate to transactions UI. Search for Recv Shipment. Select transaction and click Program Template Click Add . Fill in parameter details and click Save. Navigate back to Recv Shipment transaction, enable parameter, and click Save. 930 System Code Configuration Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 930 Select the record and click Code ID s Select an existing Code Id record and click Copy Fill in the following details and click save Receive 1 Item b. Receive Multi Item c. Out of Range Questions UI Navigate to Questions UI Click Add Add the appropriate details for the Temperature questions Temp erature 1 through Temp erature 6 and Click Save Question Answer Determination Rules UI Navigate to Question Answer Determination Rules UI Click Add Criteria Select Receive 1 Item Business Activity Click Saved Filters and click Apply Fill out the following information and click Save and Apply Repeat steps 2-5 to add criteria for Multi Item and Out of Range .

[Document: MCLN_FS_EX26B_Configuration Guide]

er Determination Rules UI Navigate to Question Answer Determination Rules UI Click Add Criteria Select Receive 1 Item Business Activity Click Saved Filters and click Apply Fill out the following information and click Save and Apply Repeat steps 2-5 to add criteria for Multi Item and Out of Range .

Select Receive 1 Item Filter Name and click Add Questions Add the 3 temperature questions previously added in the Questions UI for Single Item Click save Repeat with Receive Multi Item a nd Out of Range to add questions for Temp 1 and Temp 1 through Temp 6. Item Miscellaneous Instructions Configuration Item minimum and maximum temperatures are stored in the item’s Miscellaneous Instructions, which must be configured. Navigate to System Codes UI and open the Code IDs for B-140. Select “Add” and fill in as below to create minimum temperature. Select “Add” and fill in as below to create maximum temperature. Item Set Up Items requiring Question and Answer temperatures should have the Commerce Numeric Attribute 1 set to 1. ITEM_CBO.COMMERCE_NUM_ATTRIBUTE1 Item Minimum and Maximum temperature ranges are added in the Item Miscellaneous Instructions. ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 1/2 ASN Custom Attributes (BOL, Seal, Trailer) Navigate to Custom Attributes UI , click Add. 2. Fill in the following details to add BOL, Seal, and Trailer attributes to the ASNs . Message Configuration Navigate to Messages UI and ensure a message ID exists with the following configuration. Navigate to Message Master UI and ensure that a message ID 2604 exists with the following configuration.
